Follow `AGENTS.md` as the canonical repository guidance.
Read the nearest local `AGENTS.md` before changing code in `apps/api` or `apps/web`.
Use `.windsurf/workflows/project-bootstrap.md` when adapting this template to a new project description.
Prefer root `make` targets for validation, especially `make docs-check`, `make docs-suggest`, and `make ci`.
Update docs when commands, workflows, architecture, or runtime exposure change.
